mean_cn: n.说某种语言的人；说话人，演讲人
mean_en: the part of a radio, television, computer, etc., that changes electric signals into sound; a person who gives a talk or makes a speech
sentence: These two girls are native English speakers.
sentence_trans: 这两位女孩是以英语为母语的人。
word_etyma: speak说话 + er名词后缀，从事...的人 → speaker说话人，演讲人
